mortgage-payment-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Monthly Mortgage Payment
mortgage-payment-calculator.description: Use our free mortgage calculator to determine your monthly home loan payment including principal, interest, taxes, and insurance.
steps: Enter your home price (the total purchase price of the property)
Add your down payment amount in dollars or as a percentage
Input your annual interest rate (check current rates from your lender)
Select your loan term (15 or 30 years are most common)
Add yearly property taxes and homeowners insurance amounts
PMI is automatically calculated if your down payment is less than 20%
Click Calculate to see your complete monthly payment breakdown

compound-interest-calculator.name: How to Calculate Compound Interest on Your Investments
compound-interest-calculator.description: Calculate how your money grows over time with compound interest using our free calculator.
steps: Enter your initial investment or principal amount
Set your expected annual interest rate or rate of return
Choose how long you plan to invest (in years)
Select compounding frequency (daily, monthly, quarterly, or annually)
Add any recurring monthly contributions you plan to make
Click Calculate to see your projected growth and total returns

bmi-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your BMI (Body Mass Index)
bmi-calculator.description: Calculate your BMI to understand where you fall on the weight scale using height and weight measurements.
steps: Select your measurement system (Imperial: feet/lbs or Metric: cm/kg)
Enter your height in the appropriate units
Enter your current weight
Optionally enter your age and gender for more accurate health insights
Click Calculate to see your BMI score and health category
Review the healthy weight range for your height

calorie-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Daily Calorie Needs
calorie-calculator.description: Determine your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) and recommended calorie intake for your fitness goals.
steps: Enter your age, gender, height, and current weight
Select your activity level from sedentary to very active
Choose your goal: lose weight, maintain weight, or gain muscle
Click Calculate to see your TDEE and recommended daily calories
Review your personalized macro breakdown (protein, carbs, fats)

budget-calculator.name: How to Create a Monthly Budget
budget-calculator.description: Use the 50/30/20 rule to create a balanced budget based on your income and expenses.
steps: Enter your monthly after-tax income (take-home pay)
List your fixed expenses (rent, utilities, insurance, minimum debt payments)
Add your variable expenses (groceries, transportation, subscriptions)
Review the suggested 50/30/20 allocation for your income
Adjust categories to match your priorities and financial goals
Click Calculate to see your budget breakdown and savings potential

retirement-planning-calculator.name: How to Calculate How Much You Need to Retire
retirement-planning-calculator.description: Estimate your retirement savings goal and determine if you're on track based on your age, income, and savings rate.
steps: Enter your current age and desired retirement age
Input your current retirement savings balance
Add your monthly contribution amount
Set your expected annual return rate (typically 7-10% for stock market)
Enter your estimated annual expenses in retirement
Click Calculate to see if you'll reach your retirement goal

tip-calculator.name: How to Calculate a Tip at a Restaurant
tip-calculator.description: Quickly calculate the right tip amount and split the bill evenly among your group.
steps: Enter the total bill amount (pre-tax subtotal recommended)
Select or enter your desired tip percentage (15%, 18%, 20%, or custom)
Enter the number of people splitting the bill
Click Calculate to see the tip amount and per-person total
Review the split breakdown showing each person's share

auto-loan-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Monthly Car Payment
auto-loan-calculator.description: Determine your monthly auto loan payment based on the vehicle price, down payment, interest rate, and loan term.
steps: Enter the vehicle purchase price
Add your down payment or trade-in value
Input the annual interest rate from your lender or pre-approval
Select the loan term (36, 48, 60, or 72 months)
Optionally add sales tax rate for your state
Click Calculate to see your monthly payment and total loan cost

tax-bracket-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Federal Tax Bracket
tax-bracket-calculator.description: Find your marginal and effective tax rates based on your taxable income and filing status.
steps: Enter your annual gross income
Select your filing status (single, married filing jointly, head of household)
Add any deductions (standard or itemized)
Click Calculate to see your tax bracket and estimated tax owed
Review the breakdown showing how much is taxed at each rate

loan-amortization-calculator.name: How to Create a Loan Amortization Schedule
loan-amortization-calculator.description: Generate a complete payment schedule showing how each payment splits between principal and interest over the life of your loan.
steps: Enter your total loan amount (principal)
Input your annual interest rate
Select the loan term in years or months
Choose your payment frequency (monthly is most common)
Click Calculate to generate your full amortization schedule
Review the table showing principal vs interest for each payment
